operator.name: TensorRtMultiDeviceInferenceOp
operator.description: Runs a single TensorRT engine sharded across >=2 GPUs (TensorRT Multi-Device, NCCL DistCollective), so one operator drives N GPUs. For models too large for one GPU or that benefit from tensor parallelism.

changelog.1.0: Initial release: multi-GPU TensorRT Multi-Device inference operator (TRT-28040).
